title: Claude Chrome Extension 0-Click Vulnerability Enables Silent Prompt Injection At

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Claude Chrome Extension 0-Click Vulnerability Enables Silent
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/02
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*a-cdn.claude.ai*'
            - '*chrome.runtime*'
            - '*claude.ai*'
            - '*event.origin*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
